TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Emmanuel_Macron, title = Emmanuel_Macron, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Emmanuel_Macron} }

S.FORM: Emmanuel Macron ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 12, José Mário Vaz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw France ta' misuw hya' ga Emmanuel Macron, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Emmanuel Macron ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 12, José Mário Vaz, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw France ta' misuw hya' ga Emmanuel Macron, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: emmanuel maʦ~ʨron rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *os~ɕ* m*rio *az, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *ranʦ~ʨe taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa emmanuel maʦ~ʨron, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
